name: Gliding
description: An airborne traversal state that reduces descent and allows steering after a jump, fall, or launch.
design_notes: Gliding changes the cost of height. It can be exploration freedom, a landing safety tool, or an aerial route puzzle. The design should define deployment conditions, stamina or durability costs, wind interaction, steering authority, and how the player exits safely.
design_purpose: Let players convert height into horizontal travel and landing control.
Expand exploration routes without giving full flight.
Create aerial decisions around stamina, wind, hazards, and landing zones.
player_fantasy: The player feels graceful and resourceful, stretching a fall into controlled travel.

parameters.name: glide_forward_lift_ratio
parameters.description: Lift or descent reduction gained from forward movement.

parameters.name: minimum_deploy_height
parameters.description: Minimum height above ground required to start gliding.

edge_cases: Deploying near the ground, ceiling, water, ladders, or ledges should not trap the player in glide state.
Wind volumes and moving platforms need rules for adding velocity without overriding steering.
Taking damage or entering hit stun should define whether glide collapses, continues, or becomes uncontrolled.
Camera pitch and landing prediction should remain readable over long descents.
common_bugs: Fall speed cap remains active after landing and makes ground movement floaty.
Stamina reaches zero but glide state does not detach until the next input event.
Forward lift is applied in camera direction rather than character or glider direction.
Collision with walls repeatedly toggles glide and creates vertical climbing exploits.
balancing_notes: Low fall speed and high turn authority approach flight; stamina or deployment height can preserve route design.
Wind boosts create spectacle but should have readable entry, exit, and recovery spaces.
accessibility_notes: Use clear stamina, landing, and wind feedback so players can plan without relying only on camera pitch.
Offer camera stabilization or reduced bobbing during long glides for motion-sensitive players.

implementation_notes.unity: Apply a glide movement state that caps downward velocity, adds steering acceleration, and clears modifiers on landing, damage, or stamina exhaustion.
implementation_notes.godot: In CharacterBody movement, clamp vertical velocity while glide is active and process wind Areas as additive forces after player steering.
implementation_notes.unreal: Use a custom movement mode or Gameplay Ability that modifies falling physics, replicates stamina drain, and exits through every landing or interruption path.
implementation_notes.web: Store glide_active, stamina, and air_velocity in actor state, clamp descent in the fixed update, and resolve collision before checking landing exit.

example_games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
example_games.note: Uses a paraglider to convert height into long-distance traversal.

example_games.title: Batman: Arkham City
example_games.note: Uses cape gliding for aerial traversal through open spaces.
